calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Alejandro Alvarez
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Tony Hernandez, Esq. (628.652.4376; Tony.Hernandez@sfgov.org) Assistant District Attorney for Petitioner.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Alejandro Alvarez is GRANTED.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
